---
title: "BPS"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Loading libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(rriskDistributions)
library(writexl)
```

## Calculating the Danish baseline for sperm motility

```{r}
#getwd()

data_app <- read_csv("DATAapplicants.csv")
data_donor <- read_csv("DATAdonors.csv")

data_donor_first <- data_donor %>%
  arrange(DonorID, EjacYR, EjacMO, EjacDAY) %>%  # ensures chronological within donor
  group_by(DonorID) %>%
  slice(1) %>%                                   # first donation
  ungroup()

# Function to calculate 32% motility
compute_p0 <- function(df, thr = 32) {
  df2 <- df %>%
    mutate(
      prog_motility_pct = 100 * (GDaConc + GDbConc) / TSconc
    ) %>%
    filter(
      is.finite(prog_motility_pct),
      prog_motility_pct >= 0,
      prog_motility_pct <= 100
    )
  
  list(
    p0 = mean(df2$prog_motility_pct < thr),
    n = nrow(df2)
  )
}

# use function on applicant data
print("applicant data")
compute_p0(data_app)


print("donor data")
compute_p0(data_donor_first)


df_mot <- compute_p0(data_app)

p0_motility <- df_mot$p0
```

## Importing BPS levels for Danish men

```{r}
#getwd()

df <- read_excel("MEN BPS.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(P25 = as.numeric(P25)) %>%
  filter(Year == 2017) %>%
  mutate(
    p0_motility     = p0_motility,
    meanlog_dk      = log(P50),
    sdlog_dk        = (log(P75) - log(P25)) / (qnorm(0.75) - qnorm(0.25)),
    p_detectable_dk = 1 - plnorm(LOD, meanlog_dk, sdlog_dk),
    mean_exp_dk     = exp(meanlog_dk + 0.5 * sdlog_dk^2),  # arithmetic mean of full distribution
    median_dk       = P50  
  )
```

## Chinese ORs

```{r}
# ORs from the Chinese paper
# Table 3
OR_q1 <- 1.00
OR_q2 <- 0.94
OR_q3 <- 1.04
OR_q4 <- 1.62

# Convert 95% CI to log-scale SE
# simulating uncertainty
LCL_q2 <- 0.62; UCL_q2 <- 1.44
LCL_q3 <- 0.68; UCL_q3 <- 1.58
LCL_q4 <- 1.07; UCL_q4 <- 2.43

se_q2 <- (log(UCL_q2) - log(LCL_q2)) / (2 * 1.96)
se_q3 <- (log(UCL_q3) - log(LCL_q3)) / (2 * 1.96)
se_q4 <- (log(UCL_q4) - log(LCL_q4)) / (2 * 1.96)
```

## Distribution

```{r}
# from Table 2
# Using p25, p50, and p75 to fit a lognormal distribution
# creatine adjusted and for two samples
fit_chi <- get.lnorm.par(
  p = c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75),
  q = c(0.13, 0.29, 0.69),
  show.output = FALSE,
  plot = TRUE
)


# extract the fitted lognormal parameters as ordinary numbers
meanlog_chi <- unname(fit_chi["meanlog"])
sdlog_chi   <- unname(fit_chi["sdlog"])


# Simulate Chinese detectable exposure distribution
set.seed(123)
x_chi <- rlnorm(1e6, meanlog = meanlog_chi, sdlog = sdlog_chi)

# Quartile cutpoints among Chinese BPS values
cut1 <- qlnorm(0.25, meanlog = meanlog_chi, sdlog = sdlog_chi)
cut2 <- qlnorm(0.50, meanlog = meanlog_chi, sdlog = sdlog_chi)
cut3 <- qlnorm(0.75, meanlog = meanlog_chi, sdlog = sdlog_chi)

# Mean dose within each quartile
dose_q1 <- mean(x_chi[x_chi <= cut1])
dose_q2 <- mean(x_chi[x_chi > cut1 & x_chi <= cut2])
dose_q3 <- mean(x_chi[x_chi > cut2 & x_chi <= cut3])
dose_q4 <- mean(x_chi[x_chi > cut3])


## Build dose-response dataset and fit linear trend ##
# dose = representative exposures (means) for the 4 quartiles
# dose_c = making tertile 1 the reference point/baseline where log(RR)=0, RR=1
# IS dose_c NECESSARY?
# logrr = converting the RR to the log scale
# se = using the SE for the log-risk estimates
study_dat <- tibble(
  dose   = c(dose_q1, dose_q2, dose_q3, dose_q4),
  dose_c = c(dose_q1, dose_q2, dose_q3, dose_q4) - dose_q1,
  logrr  = log(c(OR_q1, OR_q2, OR_q3, OR_q4)),
  se     = c(NA, se_q2, se_q3, se_q4)
)


# fitting linear model, trying to finde the slope beta of the best straight line
# lm(logrr ~ 0 + dose_c) fits the line without an intercept to force it through (0,0) 
# this means dose_c = 0, logrr = 0 which makes 1 at reference dose (RR = e^logrr = 1, where logrr = 0)
# data = study_dat[2:3, ], uses just tertile 2 and 3 (removes the first row) because tertile 1 is reference

fit_lin <- lm(
  logrr ~ 0 + dose_c,
  data = study_dat[2:4, ],
  weights = 1 / study_dat$se[2:4]^2
)

beta_hat <- unname(coef(fit_lin)["dose_c"])
beta_se  <- summary(fit_lin)$coefficients["dose_c", "Std. Error"]

x_ref <- dose_q1

beta_hat
beta_se
summary(fit_lin)
```

```{r}
# making a sequence of dose values for plotting
pred_grid <- tibble(
  dose = seq(min(study_dat$dose), max(study_dat$dose), length.out = 100)
) %>%
  mutate(
    dose_c = dose - dose_q1
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    logrr_fit = predict(fit_lin, newdata = .)
  )

# plot
p_logrr <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = pred_grid, aes(x = dose, y = logrr_fit)) +
  geom_point(data = study_dat, aes(x = dose, y = logrr), size = 3) +
  labs(x = "BPS concentration", y = "log(OR)") +
  theme_minimal()

p_logrr

# saving plot
ggsave(
  filename = "logrr_linear_model_bps_semen.png",
  plot = p_logrr,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)




```

## YLD inputs

```{r}
## GBD inputs: male infertility prevalence (Denmark, 15-49, 2023)

prevalence_mode  <- 12120.59
prevalence_lower <- 6434.65
prevalence_upper <- 21390.85

## Disability weight (GBD, male infertility)

DW_mode <- 0.007564045
DW_min  <- 0.003335558
DW_max  <- 0.015242128


### YLD FROM GBD ###
# 78.41 (25.71, 180.01)

dw_test <- 78.41/12120.59

### NO YLL SINCE INFERTILITY DOES NOT CAUSE DEATH
```

## PERT

```{r}
## Helper functions

rpert <- function(n, min, mode, max) {
  alpha <- 1 + 4 * (mode - min) / (max - min)
  beta  <- 1 + 4 * (max - mode) / (max - min)
  min + rbeta(n, alpha, beta) * (max - min)
}
```

## Monte Carlo

```{r}
run_mc_row_semen <- function(
  p_detectable_dk, mean_exp_dk,
  prevalence_mode, prevalence_lower, prevalence_upper,
  DW_min, DW_mode, DW_max,
  beta_hat, beta_se, x_ref
) {

  # uncertainty in dose-response slope
  beta <- rnorm(1, mean = beta_hat, sd = beta_se)

  # RR for poor motility at mean detectable Danish exposure
  rr_motility <- exp(beta * (mean_exp_dk - x_ref))

  # PAF for poor motility
  PAF_motility <- (p_detectable_dk * (rr_motility - 1)) /
                  (1 + p_detectable_dk * (rr_motility - 1))

  # mediation fraction: proportion of male infertility driven by poor motility
  # PERT based on literature: range: 16-24%
  med_frac <- rpert(1, min = 0.16, mode = 0.20, max = 0.24)

  # PAF for male infertility
  PAF_infertility <- PAF_motility * med_frac

  # prevalence uncertainty
  # does this align with the correct approach?
  prev <- rpert(1,
                min  = prevalence_lower,
                mode = prevalence_mode,
                max  = prevalence_upper)

  # attributable cases
  AC <- PAF_infertility * prev

  # disability weight uncertainty
  DW <- rpert(1, DW_min, DW_mode, DW_max)

  # YLD (prevalence-based, no duration multiplier)
  YLD  <- AC * DW
  DALY <- YLD   # no YLL for male infertility

  tibble(
    PAF_motility    = PAF_motility,
    PAF_infertility = PAF_infertility,
    med_frac        = med_frac,
    AC              = AC,
    DW              = DW,
    YLD             = YLD,
    DALY            = DALY
  )
}

run_mc_summary_semen <- function(
  p_detectable_dk, mean_exp_dk,
  prevalence_mode, prevalence_lower, prevalence_upper,
  DW_min, DW_mode, DW_max,
  beta_hat, beta_se, x_ref,
  nsim = 3000
) {

  sims <- map_dfr(seq_len(nsim), ~ run_mc_row_semen(
    p_detectable_dk  = p_detectable_dk,
    mean_exp_dk        = mean_exp_dk,
    prevalence_mode  = prevalence_mode,
    prevalence_lower = prevalence_lower,
    prevalence_upper = prevalence_upper,
    DW_min           = DW_min,
    DW_mode          = DW_mode,
    DW_max           = DW_max,
    beta_hat         = beta_hat,
    beta_se          = beta_se,
    x_ref            = x_ref
  ))

  tibble(
    PAF_motility_med    = median(sims$PAF_motility),
    PAF_motility_lo     = quantile(sims$PAF_motility, 0.025),
    PAF_motility_hi     = quantile(sims$PAF_motility, 0.975),

    PAF_infertility_med = median(sims$PAF_infertility),
    PAF_infertility_lo  = quantile(sims$PAF_infertility, 0.025),
    PAF_infertility_hi  = quantile(sims$PAF_infertility, 0.975),

    AC_med  = median(sims$AC),
    AC_lo   = quantile(sims$AC, 0.025),
    AC_hi   = quantile(sims$AC, 0.975),

    YLD_med  = median(sims$YLD),
    YLD_lo   = quantile(sims$YLD, 0.025),
    YLD_hi   = quantile(sims$YLD, 0.975),

    DALY_med = median(sims$DALY),
    DALY_lo  = quantile(sims$DALY, 0.025),
    DALY_hi  = quantile(sims$DALY, 0.975)
  )
}
```

```{r}
results_semen <- df %>%
  mutate(
    mc = pmap(
      list(p_detectable_dk, mean_exp_dk),
      ~ run_mc_summary_semen(
        p_detectable_dk  = ..1,
        mean_exp_dk        = ..2,
        prevalence_mode  = prevalence_mode,
        prevalence_lower = prevalence_lower,
        prevalence_upper = prevalence_upper,
        DW_min           = DW_min,
        DW_mode          = DW_mode,
        DW_max           = DW_max,
        beta_hat         = beta_hat,
        beta_se          = beta_se,
        x_ref            = x_ref,
        nsim             = 3000
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  unnest(mc)

results_semen
```

## checks

```{r}

df %>%
  mutate(rr_at_median = exp(beta_hat * (mean_exp_dk - x_ref))) %>%
  dplyr::select(Year, mean_exp_dk, p_detectable_dk, rr_at_median)

beta_hat
x_ref


dose_q1
dose_q2
dose_q3
dose_q4
```
